title: Loop → RSI Control Room
purpose: Demonstrate how a restartable long-running agent loop becomes deterministic RSI governance only when evidence, replay, baselines, persistence, risk, dossier packaging, and human authority gates survive.

loopToRsiMap.loopRule: Write the loop, not the prompt
loopToRsiMap.rsiControl: TARGET/EMIT creates repeatable cycle contracts instead of one-off instructions
Tool-bounded role contracts separate planner, generator, evaluator, trace-reader, and reviewer
Mission Contract defines success criteria, risk, evidence, and done condition before execution
RSIState binds contract, progress, log, ECI ledger, proof bundle, and dossier
Drift sentinel and cycle index preserve continuity without silent state reset
Rubrics become advisory while gates remain mandatory
Trace, replay, and Chronicle convert debugging into institutional memory
Harness drag is measured and obsolete scaffolding is removed only after evidence
Next-bottleneck exposure becomes the next TARGET allocation

claimBoundary: This is a public-safe demonstration. It is not a claim of achieved RSI, AGI, ASI, SOTA, external audit, or production authority.
